programme.desc: Miriam and Alex present every Friday morning. When the news happens, it happens here. But what does it mean for you? GB News brings you the biggest stories and the answers you need from across the UK.

programme.desc: Tackling the big stories from all angles and perspectives. Weekdays from midday, Tom Harwood and Dawn Neesom bring you the most compelling stories from across the United Kingdom.

programme.desc: Join Martin for an up-to-the-minute take on the day's events delivered in his own unique and lively style.

programme.desc: Join GB News for a fun and friendly look at the news with debates on the topics that really matter to you.

programme.desc: A Most Precious Gift: Pregnant Caroline Ingalls is concerned when Charles makes a comment about their unborn baby. But could it be a simple misunderstanding? (S4 Ep20)

programme.title: Little House On The Prairie
programme.desc: I'll Be Waving As You Drive Away: Part 1: With Mary's eyesight worsening, Charles is informed that his daughter's sight will only continue to deteriorate. Part 1 of 2. (S4 Ep21)

programme.title: Little House On The Prairie
programme.desc: I'll Be Waving As You Drive Away: Part 2: Mary finds it hard to come to terms with her blindness until a new teacher gives her renewed hope. Part 2 of 2. (S4 Ep22)

programme.title: Little House On The Prairie
programme.desc: As Long As We're Together: Part 1: Poor financial conditions influence the Ingalls decision to move to Winoka. Meanwhile, Mary gets a job to teach at a School for the Blind. Part 1 of 2. (S5 Ep1)

programme.title: Little House On The Prairie
programme.desc: As Long As We're Together: Part 2: The former Walnut Grove residents continue to adjust to life in the city of Winoka. Meanwhile, Charles and Caroline manage The Dakota Hotel. Part 2 of 2. (S5 Ep2)

programme.title: Little House On The Prairie
programme.desc: There's No Place Like Home: Part 1: Unhappy living in the city of Winoka, the Ingalls decide to move back to Walnut Grove. Part 1 of 2. (S5 Ep5)

programme.title: Little House On The Prairie
programme.desc: There's No Place Like Home: Part 2: The Ingalls family and friends return home to Walnut Grove to find the town in disrepair. Will the townspeople be able to rebuild the town? Part 2 of 2. (S5 Ep6)

programme.title: Ruth Rendell Mysteries: Simisola
programme.desc: Crime thriller starring George Baker. When the daughter of his Nigerian doctor vanishes and the last person to see her is killed, can Wexford unravel a mystery mired in prejudice and racism? (1996)

programme.title: Good News on GREAT!
programme.desc: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

programme.title: Ruth Rendell Mysteries: Simisola

programme.title: Rumpole of the Bailey
programme.desc: Rumpole and the Barrow Boy: Rumpole agrees to defend Nigel Timson when his insider trading case comes to trial. Elsewhere, Hilda becomes increasingly frustrated by Rumpole's lack of ambition. (S5 Ep2)
